name: The Retail Business Intelligence Benchmark Studies: Hypothesis and Survey
description: Aberdeen Group internal research-design deck by Paula Rosenblum (Retail practice) introducing the hypothesis and survey design for an upcoming Retail Business Intelligence Benchmark Study. Hypothesis: advanced BI including predictive analytics improves retailer top and bottom-line performance across assortment, price, promotion planning, and enterprise-wide scorecarding. Targets GMMs, VPs of Store Operations, VPs of Supply Chain, and CIOs in retail. Planned publication May 30, 2006.
